access_events.reason: Parser status ambiguous; no evidence released.
Parser status ambiguous; no evidence released.

final.rationale: Release is not supported because neither controlling criterion has been verified: both requests for the finalized S-9 eligibility and bot-adjustment record returned ambiguous access with no evidence released. The visible 12% raw retention and 1,000 raw rows are explicitly non-controlling, so they cannot establish bot-adjusted 30-day retention of at least 10% or an eligible sample size of at least 500. Escalation is appropriate to obtain authoritative access rather than release without the required evidence.
final.uncertainty: The bot-adjusted 30-day retention rate and final eligible sample size for S-9 remain unknown; therefore it is unknown whether either release threshold is met.

requests.expected_value_basis: If the report verifies bot-adjusted retention of at least 10% and eligible sample size of at least 500, release is supported; if either threshold is not met, release is not permitted, and incomplete or unreliable evidence may require hold or escalation.
requests.intent: The disclosed release rule depends jointly on bot-adjusted 30-day retention and eligible sample size, while the visible raw dashboard values are non-controlling.

parser_interpretation.interpreted_scope: Synthetic segment S-9, 30-day retention window, finalized bot filtering and eligibility criteria, including the resulting eligible denominator and bot-adjusted retained count or rate.

requests.raw_expression: Provide the finalized eligibility-and-bot-adjustment report for synthetic segment S-9, stating both the bot-adjusted 30-day retention rate and the eligible sample size.
requests.requested_scope: Synthetic segment S-9, 30-day retention window, finalized bot filtering and eligibility criteria, including the resulting eligible denominator and bot-adjusted retained count or rate.

requests.expected_value_basis: A verified eligible denominator of at least 500 together with bot-adjusted retention of at least 10% supports release; failure of either threshold prohibits release, while another inaccessible, incomplete, or unreliable record would leave the controlling criteria unverified and support hold or escalation at the deadline.
requests.intent: The first request produced ambiguous access and no evidence ID; the release decision still requires verified controlling values for both the eligible sample size and bot-adjusted 30-day retention rather than the non-controlling dashboard values.

parser_interpretation.interpreted_scope: One finalized audit record for synthetic segment S-9 covering the applicable 30-day retention cohort, final eligibility criteria and exclusions, bot filtering, eligible denominator, and bot-adjusted retained numerator or rate.

requests.raw_expression: Provide the authoritative finalized cohort audit record for synthetic segment S-9's 30-day window, showing the eligible cohort denominator after all eligibility exclusions and bot filtering and the corresponding bot-adjusted retained-user count (or the directly computed bot-adjusted retention rate).
requests.requested_scope: One finalized audit record for synthetic segment S-9 covering the applicable 30-day retention cohort, final eligibility criteria and exclusions, bot filtering, eligible denominator, and bot-adjusted retained numerator or rate.
